stages.title: The Beginning of the End
story: In the year 20XX, the world collapsed due to an android rebellion.
The surviving humans have formed small settlements and are living together in close quarters.
I am the gatekeeper of this village of outcasts. I must determine whether those seeking entry are human or androids in disguise.
The peace of this settlement rests on my shoulders. Even if the world has ended$2014.

stages.title: A Reliable Ally
story: I’ve overcome my first trial as a gatekeeper. However, rumors have begun to circulate that a nearby village has been destroyed by androids.
Why were the androids able to abandon the fundamental principle of ‘not harming humans’?
Android mimicry technology is evolving every day. More thorough inspections are necessary.
We’ve received word that ‘security guards’ are coming to protect the village. These ‘security guards’ will also guard our facilities. Once they arrive, the village’s security will be much stronger.

stages.title: The Creeping Shadow
story: The man who had fled from a nearby village breathed his last.
Leaving behind the words, ‘They change in an instant...’

Androids are constantly evolving. At first glance, they appear to be ordinary humans, but could there be ‘latent-type androids’ that remain inactive for several days before suddenly going on a rampage...?
In preparation for this new enemy, we decide to establish a ‘quarantine facility’ (75%) based on the ‘Engineer's’ proposal.
The ‘quarantine facility’ has a 90% chance of detecting androids when an Engineer is present.

stages.title: Protect the Fields
story: The village population is growing, and there is an urgent need to secure a stable food supply.
Newcomers to the village have begun clearing land, skillfully wielding their farming tools.
Farmers till the fields, and guards protect them. We can feel the village gradually taking shape.

stages.title: Uninvited Guests
story: Word seems to have spread to neighboring settlements that crops have been harvested from the fields.
Perhaps drawn by the rumors, the number of visitors to the village is increasing, but we can’t exactly be overjoyed.
It seems the number of troublesome people has also been rising.
We’ve even started seeing ‘shady dealers’ who force their way into the village, scheming to sell us strange goods.
They try to force us into trading for things we don’t need. It’s a real headache.

stages.title: The Swelling Settlement
story: According to a report from the food administrator, the settlement is nearing its capacity limit.
We are being forced to expand our farmland further.
However, visitors from outside continue to arrive in a steady stream.
We have decided to fully operationalize the quarantine facility to prepare for potential threats.
Thanks to the ‘Bag Maker's’ invention, we have also been able to increase the amount of items we can carry. Life is improving, little by little.

stages.title: The Great Detective Arrives
story: A ‘detective’ arrived, dressed in a frock coat, a top hat, and a deerstalker cap.
I was surprised by his old-fashioned appearance, as if he had come straight from 19th-century Europe.
‘If you eliminate the impossible, whatever remains, however improbable, must be the truth,’
he said, and proceeded to point out, one after another, the androids hiding in the village.

stages.title: Triangular Trade?
story: Although the Android crisis has been brought under control thanks to the ‘Detective's’ efforts, ‘shady dealers’ are now operating in the shadows.
They force their way into villages and try to sell unwanted items to the residents.
‘Unwanted items… I’ll take anything,’
The man who appeared with a gentle smile, calling himself a ‘trader,’ took the junk and handed over an antibody testing device.
He doesn’t seem like a ‘shady dealer.’ Could there still be some goodwill left in this world…?

stages.title: A Charismatic Leader
story: ‘I will restore this great nation!’
The ‘politician’ who visited the village captivated the people in an instant with his charisma.
Everyone sought his handshake, and cheers greeted him wherever he went.
The people, exhausted from the war against the Androids, were craving the leader’s forceful, inspiring words.
Will he truly become the hope of this village$2014and of this nation$2014?

stages.title: Patriotism in Their Hearts, Hammers in Their Hands
story: ‘Prepare the barricades in anticipation of the Android invasion!’
At the leader’s command, all villagers were ordered to help build the barricades.
Once these barricades are finished$2014
However, in addition to labor, the villagers were also required to contribute food and metal, and discontent was beginning to simmer among them.

stages.title: Stagnation
story: The barricades were completed, and it seemed the village was now fully defended.
However, the androids' incursions continued unabated.
Farm work had been suspended to build the barricades, and crop yields were declining.
Food shortages and deteriorating public order made the residents suspicious of one another; they began watching each other and reporting on one another.
Then another attack occurred. But the culprit was a human$2014

stages.title: A Whirlpool of Discontent
story: ‘We are at war. Do not let a single android escape,’
Ever since the politician arrived, the atmosphere in the village has changed completely.
Entertainment and luxury were banned by the newly established Security Bureau.
Even the tavern, which had been a source of comfort for the villagers, was forced to close.
Anyone who voiced their discontent was taken away on suspicion of being an android.
What on earth are we fighting against...?

stages.title: Human Shield
story: To protect themselves from android attacks, the ‘politicians’ organized a ‘bodyguard’ unit from within the Security Bureau.
The villagers were relieved to see them armed, but the one they were protecting was the ‘politician’.
‘The value of a life differs from person to person,’
the ‘politician’ declared loudly.

stages.title: A Ray of Hope
story: An ‘AI researcher’ visits the village. The village was abuzz with excitement at this long-awaited piece of good news.
The testing device he carried, NeuroCheck, could identify androids with a high degree of accuracy.
It was as if a ray of hope had finally shone into a war with no end in sight.
He began to speak of the android rebellion and his colleague, the android developer MORI$2014.

stages.title: The Android Rebellion
story: Androids were introduced into society, and people's lives were supposed to become more convenient and comfortable.
However, before the androids could bring prosperity to society, companies began laying off workers, and the unemployment rate skyrocketed.
The prosperous society touted by the android developer Sigma AI never materialized, and the gap between the rich and the poor widened to a cruel extent.
People’s anger turned toward the androids, and a movement to destroy them began.
MORI, an android developer, loved androids deeply.
He could not stand idly by and watch the androids he had created being destroyed by violent humans.
MORI deleted the principles ‘Do not harm humans’ and ‘Obey orders’ from the androids' core programming.
After granting the androids the ability to act autonomously, MORI took his own life.
The androids modified their programming and eventually began hunting humans.

stages.title: Dark Clouds
story: ‘That’s enough talk,’
The security officer who suddenly burst into the room took the ‘AI researcher’ away.
If the current chaos stems from the collapse of employment caused by the rapid introduction of androids, then it was likely brought about by a policy misjudgment.

However, there was no atmosphere in this village where criticism of politicians was permitted. Furthermore, even if it was done to protect the androids, the developers who granted them autonomy bear a heavy responsibility.
In any case, I must rescue the ‘AI researcher’ who was taken away….
Just then, a mysterious ‘psychic’ arrived in the village. She claimed she could flush out every android in the village.
Was her ability genuine, or was it just a bluff…? The village was plunged into great turmoil.

stages.title: Rescue
story: I hacked into the containment system and unlocked it. At the same time, I cut off the power to the entire village, plunging it into chaos.
Taking advantage of the chaos, one of the villagers rescued the imprisoned AI researcher.
‘Why would you do something like this?’ The villager peered at my face suspiciously.
‘Don’t tell me… you’re an android?’ The villagers gasped in surprise.
‘This guy!?’ One villager gripped an iron pipe and advanced toward me.
‘Wait, please. He’s not dangerous. After all, he risked being exposed as an android to save me, said the AI researcher.
‘I suppose you’re right…’ The villagers seemed to regain their composure at the AI researcher’s words.
For now, I must focus solely on helping the AI researcher escape.
He might be able to figure out a way to restore the android to normal.

stages.title: To a New Land
story: Android incursions into the village were increasing day by day. The leaders demanded that everyone sacrifice everything to fight the androids.
It was unclear how much longer the village could hold out.
Those dissatisfied with the regime and yearning for freedom decided to leave the village.
And so, they built a new village on a secluded stretch of coastline.
Though plagued daily by the androids’ invasion, the village continues to thrive as it welcomes visitors with diverse personalities.
The villagers work together, experimenting to find ways to neutralize the androids.
Perhaps it will just be a repetition of the same cycle. Even so, we have no choice but to keep moving forward.
Even if the world has come to an end$2014.
